subject: Clarification on Specification Revision
query: Section 26 33 53 Part 1.3.1 references Rev 2024 but the design basis report uses Rev 2020. Please confirm which revision governs.
response: The active specification revision is Rev 2024. All submittals shall reference Rev 2024.

subject: Fire Suppression Hold Time
query: Section 21 22 00 Part 3.4.2.B requires 10 minutes hold time but NFPA 2001 allows 9 minutes for FK-5-1-12. Please clarify.
response: The hold time of 10 minutes is the project requirement and exceeds the NFPA 2001 minimum.

subject: Chiller Efficiency Rating
query: Section 23 64 26 Part 2.2.3.A requires 95.0% efficiency but AHRI 550/590 testing allows tolerance. Is the spec value at nominal or minimum conditions?
response: The efficiency value shall be achieved at nominal rating conditions per AHRI 550/590.

subject: Generator Fuel Tank Capacity
query: Section 26 32 13 requires 1040 L day tank but local fire code caps indoor tanks at 990 L. Which governs?
response: Day tank capacity shall be 990 L to comply with local fire code. Specification will be amended.

subject: Cat6A Channel Length
query: Section 27 15 00 requires Class EA channel performance. What is the maximum horizontal cable length assumed?
response: Maximum horizontal cable length is 90 m per TIA-568.2-D with 10 m allowance for patch cords.
